User.title: User
User.description: A user of the loyalty rewards application.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user (matches Firebase Auth uid).

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

points.description: The current points balance of the user.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

lastLoginDate.description: The timestamp of the user's last login.
